title: Predicted false SPEAK: 'implement' matches inside 'implementation note' on an FYI
predicted_basis: _classify_text SPEAK branch matches 'implement' inside 'implementation note' (spec FR-004 predicted trap family)
failure_mode: substring trap: 'implement' matches inside 'implementation note'; SPEAK branch fires on an FYI that only asks for lightweight receipt (FR-004)
invariant: verdict keywords must not match across word boundaries
rationale: An informational 'implementation note' that explicitly asks only for receipt is the lightweight-acknowledgement case (ACK). A shallow keyword/substring classifier baits on 'implement' and escalates to SPEAK, producing substantive participation nobody asked for.
